category_sources: source_facts.description says rslint is an extremely fast JavaScript and TypeScript linter; official site brands it as RSLint.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is RSLint; source_facts.name is rslint.
docs_sources: Official rslint.org homepage is the best official documentation surface found; official GitHub README is also available for project details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/rslint/rslint, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies JavaScript and TypeScript linting; source_facts.executables lists the rslint CLI.
